subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Shah Siyavash, like unto an angel and celestial messenger, is a devoted servant at the threshold of the Abhá Beauty—my spirit be offered up for His loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله شاه سیاوش چون فرشته و سروش حلقه بگوش جمال ابهی روحی لاحبائه
